title: Wumpus World Problem-Solving Cycle with an Expert System
description: A flowchart illustrating how an expert system uses its knowledge base and inference engine to perceive, reason, and act within the Wumpus World environment.
relationships: Agent perceives Environment (e.g., Stench, Breeze, Glitter)
Percepts are fed into the Knowledge Base as new Facts
Inference Engine applies logical Rules to the Knowledge Base
Engine derives new Facts (e.g., 'Pit in [2,3]', 'Safe to move to [1,2]')
Inferred knowledge leads the Agent to choose an Action (e.g., Move, Grab, Shoot)
Action is performed on the Environment, changing its state
